note: seq=15: CONTINUOUS Socrata uncap (intake is the bottleneck; enrichment has 192 idle-hungry lanes). Importer now paginates the FULL Chicago+NYC business-license datasets ($limit=50000/$offset until exhausted; SOCRATA_LIMIT default 0=unlimited) and is idempotent (pre-check + ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING; never clobbers enrichment). (a) immediate BOUNDED run (60k) for an instant visible climb past 15k with only a short pipe pause; (b) INDEPENDENT atlas-socrata.timer (first run +2min, then every 90min) does the heavy FULL backfill OFF the deploy pipe so it never freezes the puller, then keeps pulling new rows (the continuous lane). business_total will climb into the hundreds of thousands, feeding the enrichment pool.

steps.note: seq=15: uncap+continuous Socrata (immediate 60k + independent full-backfill timer)

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS Socrata continuous lane (Chicago r5kz-chrr + NYC w7w3-xahh business licenses, FULL paginate -> atlas.business)
Documentation=https://github.com/cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=10
IOSchedulingClass=idle
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
Environment=SOCRATA_PAGE=50000
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/socrata_import.py
TimeoutStartSec=6h

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS Socrata continuous lane -- full backfill then ongoing new-row pulls (off the deploy pipe)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=2min
OnUnitActiveSec=90min
Persistent=true
Unit=atlas-socrata.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/socrata_import.py':'416ae7832ffb4802d113b5f216e410ef8c4a4442372fe6357f5a2d89d9f915d9'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"
